title: Agents Are Just Loops
summary: A video tutorial demonstrating how to build AI agents using the open-source Strands Agents SDK. The tutorial covers four progressively complex agent patterns: single-tool agents, multi-tool agents, agents with hooks for observability, and multi-agent orchestrators. The content emphasizes that agent loops are conceptually simple and require minimal setup.
